name: Text edit on a reactive {{ binding }}
notes:
Edits the text content of

{{ label }}

inside StatefulCounter. `label` is a computed property derived from a ref (`count`). On hydration walk Vue re-renders the text to the computed's current value (`0 clicks`), discarding the edge-applied text. This is the canonical reactive-binding recovery case — isolated from case 07 (which mixes static and reactive ops in one variation). Reinforcement: annotator stamps data-allow-mismatch='text', and companion re-applies post-mount.
